display_text: Lion Aghanim's Scepter: Finger of Death becomes an AoE nuke with increased damage and reduced cooldown. This upgrade counters clustered enemy formations, punishing grouped pushes or teamfight positioning while amplifying Lion's burst damage potential in late-game engagements.
search_text: Lion Aghanim Scepter AoE burst damage teamfight counter-push Finger of Death upgrade

display_text: Lion Aghanim's Shard: Mana Drain now affects multiple enemies and grants Debuff Immunity with magic resistance during channeling. This hard-counters single-target disables and magic nukes, transforming Lion into a resilient mana-denial tool against spell-reliant lineups while sustaining himself in fights.
search_text: Lion Aghanim Shard Mana Drain anti-disable debuff immune magic resistance multi-target
